title: fumana thymifolia var. glabra
intro: Fumana thymifolia var. glabra, also known as glabrous fumana, is a plant species in the family Cistaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of Fumana thymifolia var. glabra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create medicinal teas, salves, and ointments.
